problem_statement: MAF runtime binding readiness needs a static failure receipt path witness after deterministic fixture parity before executable Python-to-Rust binding can be reconsidered.
success_criteria: MafFailureReceiptPathWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

MafFailureReceiptPathWitness binds deterministic fixture parity refs, MAF CLI scaffold refs, WorkerFailureReceipt refs, VerificationResult refs, KernelProof refs, transition receipt refs, UAO refs, LifeMeaningJudgment refs, and receipt refs
MafFailureReceiptPathWitness records failure receipt path closure while keeping solver outcome AwaitingEvidence and runtime binding only reconsiderable

MafFailureReceiptPathWitness blocks runtime binding, CLI execution, subprocess execution, shell invocation, child process spawn, PyO3 binding, Rust crate execution, Python Rust imports, external connector calls, network calls, secret access, raw failure payload retention, filesystem writes, runtime dispatch, canonical state mutation, terminal closure, and success claims
MafFailureReceiptPathWitness rejects authority drift, path scope drift, future witness drift, failure path descriptor drift, digest drift, secret markers, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
constraints: runtime_binding_claimed, subprocess_execution_claimed, cli_execution_claimed, and command_behavior_claimed remain false
each source artifact digest must match repository-local source files
each failure path descriptor digest must match the canonical path id, failure source, failure receipt, verification ref, and materialization status tuple
